rules.description: Single character flag (Y/N) indicating whether the ship-to address has been validated against a CASS-certified database, encoded within MaxiCode secondary message.
Indicates the billing method for the shipment such as Prepaid (P/P), collect, or third party.
A single calculated digit at the end of the UPS tracking number using the Modified MOD 10 algorithm for data validity checking.
A 3-digit numeric code identifying the UPS service level, encoded in the MaxiCode primary message.
Code 128 1D barcode encoding the full UPS tracking number with highlighting bars above and below.
On Access Point labels, the consignee's personal address printed at the bottom of the label, separate from the Ship To Access Point address.
Text description of the contents/commodities being shipped, appearing on international shipment labels.
The city name in the consignee/destination address, positioned relative to postal code per country address format.
ISO 3166 two-letter country code for the destination/consignee country, used in addressing and MaxiCode encoding.
Postal code for the destination/consignee address, format varies by country per Appendix F, also encoded in MaxiCode.
The state, province, or county in the consignee/destination address, part of the postal code line format.
One-tenth inch solid black lines located immediately above and below the UPS barcode block to frame the barcode area.
Human-readable text representation of the tracking number barcode data, printed below or adjacent to the Code 128 barcode.
Julian day of the year (001-366) representing the package pickup date, encoded in the MaxiCode secondary message.
2D MaxiCode barcode encoding structured address, tracking, and shipment data for automated package sorting, using Mode 2 for US and Mode 3 for non-US destinations.
Three-digit numeric code within the MaxiCode barcode identifying the UPS service level, with different codes for COD vs non-COD packages.
ISO 3166 country code for the origin/shipper country, typically a European nation for UPS Europe labels.
Indicates the package number relative to total packages in the shipment, displayed as N OF X format.
Package number out of total packages in shipment, encoded within MaxiCode secondary message.
Indicator for non-standard package types such as letter or envelope, displayed adjacent to the weight.
Weight of the package in whole pounds or kilograms rounded up, encoded in MaxiCode and printed as human-readable text.
PDF417 2D barcode containing additional shipment data, conditionally required by UPS.
Package number within a multi-piece shipment shown as 'X OF Y' format.
Code 128 barcode containing the receiver's postal code prefixed with EAN-UCC Application Identifier 420 (domestic) or 421 (international).
Seven-digit unique reference number embedded in positions 11-17 of the tracking number.
UPS routing code identifying destination sort facility and delivery route, displayed prominently on the label.
Narrow lines used to segregate barcode and information blocks on the label for visual structure.
Graphical icon indicating UPS service class, time of day, and day of delivery using a 3-position code.
Two-character code embedded in the tracking number identifying the specific UPS service level and accessorial options.
Human-readable UPS service name indicating the level of service for the shipment.
Prominently displayed name of the UPS service being used for the shipment.
UPS service level for the shipment, represented by the service icon and encoded in the service indicator.
Date the shipment is tendered to UPS, in DD MMM YYYY format.
Complete shipper/sender address block including contact name, phone, company, street, postal code, and country.
City and postal code of the shipper/sender location within the ship-from address block.
Company name of the shipper/sender in the ship-from address block.
Contact name of the person at the shipping origin/sender location.
Country name of the shipper/sender, displayed as the last line of the ship-from address block.
Additional address line for the shipper such as suite, floor, or building in the ship-from address block.
The telephone number of the shipper/sender in the ship-from address block.
The postal/ZIP code and city line for the shipper's address, format varies by country.
The street address of the shipper/sender location.
The street address of the destination/consignee, also encoded in the MaxiCode secondary message.
The city name of the destination/consignee address, maximum 20 characters, also encoded in MaxiCode.
The company name at the destination/consignee address, or UPS Access Point facility name for AP shipments.
The name of the person to whom the package is being shipped.
The telephone number of the consignee/recipient, required for Access Point labels.
The contact name at the destination/consignee address, preceded by the TO: prefix.
The full country name of the destination/consignee address, required for international shipments.
The 3-digit ISO 3166 numeric country code for the destination, encoded in the MaxiCode primary message.
Additional address line for the destination/consignee such as suite, floor, or building.
The SHIP TO: label text that introduces the consignee address block on the label.
The phone number of the consignee/recipient at the destination address.
The postal code of the destination address, encoded in both MaxiCode primary message and postal barcode.
The combined postal code and city of the consignee destination, format varies by country.
The postal/ZIP code and city line for the destination address, format varies by country.
The 2-character state or province code of the destination, encoded in MaxiCode secondary message.
The street address of the destination/consignee, or UAP street address for Access Point shipments.
The date the shipment is created/tendered to UPS, required for international movements
The shipment dimensional weight, printed when dimensional weight applies for non-US-domestic movements
An optional shipment identifier encoded in the MaxiCode secondary message
UPS shipment number calculated from the first package tracking number, required for international shipments
The total weight of all packages in the shipment, rounded up to the next whole pound or half kilogram
The unique UPS shipper number identifying the shipping account, displayed in the ship-from information area
The UPS customized unique 18-character package tracking number starting with 1Z
Code 128 barcode encoding the full 1Z tracking number, the primary machine-readable barcode on the label
Human-readable text representation of the tracking number printed near the tracking barcode
The city and postal code of the UPS Access Point location
The country of the UPS Access Point location
Additional address line for the UPS Access Point location
The name of the UPS Access Point location where the package will be held for pickup
The street address of the UPS Access Point location
The 6-character UPS account number embedded in positions 3-8 of the tracking number
Weight and PAK indicator replacing the standard package weight when UPS PAK packaging is used
UPS delivery facility routing code derived from the destination postal code, 12 positions
The Standard Carrier Alpha Code for UPS, always fixed value UPSN, encoded in MaxiCode secondary message
The complete UPS service name printed in uppercase letters identifying the service used for the shipment
The version number of the UPS Routing Code data file used to generate routing information

address_validation.description: Single character flag (Y/N) indicating whether the ship-to address has been validated against a CASS-certified database, encoded within MaxiCode secondary message.

billing_indicator.description: Indicates the billing method for the shipment such as Prepaid (P/P), collect, or third party.

check_digit.description: A single calculated digit at the end of the UPS tracking number using the Modified MOD 10 algorithm for data validity checking.

class_of_service.description: A 3-digit numeric code identifying the UPS service level, encoded in the MaxiCode primary message.

code_128_barcode.description: Code 128 1D barcode encoding the full UPS tracking number with highlighting bars above and below.

consignee_address_block.description: On Access Point labels, the consignee's personal address printed at the bottom of the label, separate from the Ship To Access Point address.

description_of_goods.description: Text description of the contents/commodities being shipped, appearing on international shipment labels.

destination_city.description: The city name in the consignee/destination address, positioned relative to postal code per country address format.

destination_country_code.description: ISO 3166 two-letter country code for the destination/consignee country, used in addressing and MaxiCode encoding.

destination_postal_code.description: Postal code for the destination/consignee address, format varies by country per Appendix F, also encoded in MaxiCode.

destination_state_province.description: The state, province, or county in the consignee/destination address, part of the postal code line format.

highlighting_bars.description: One-tenth inch solid black lines located immediately above and below the UPS barcode block to frame the barcode area.

human_readable_tracking_number.description: Human-readable text representation of the tracking number barcode data, printed below or adjacent to the Code 128 barcode.

julian_day_of_pickup.description: Julian day of the year (001-366) representing the package pickup date, encoded in the MaxiCode secondary message.

maxicode.description: 2D MaxiCode barcode encoding structured address, tracking, and shipment data for automated package sorting, using Mode 2 for US and Mode 3 for non-US destinations.

maxicode_class_of_service.description: Three-digit numeric code within the MaxiCode barcode identifying the UPS service level, with different codes for COD vs non-COD packages.

origin_country_code.description: ISO 3166 country code for the origin/shipper country, typically a European nation for UPS Europe labels.

package_count.description: Indicates the package number relative to total packages in the shipment, displayed as N OF X format.

package_in_shipment.description: Package number out of total packages in shipment, encoded within MaxiCode secondary message.

package_type_indicator.description: Indicator for non-standard package types such as letter or envelope, displayed adjacent to the weight.

package_weight.description: Weight of the package in whole pounds or kilograms rounded up, encoded in MaxiCode and printed as human-readable text.

pdf417_barcode.description: PDF417 2D barcode containing additional shipment data, conditionally required by UPS.

piece_count.description: Package number within a multi-piece shipment shown as 'X OF Y' format.

postal_barcode.description: Code 128 barcode containing the receiver's postal code prefixed with EAN-UCC Application Identifier 420 (domestic) or 421 (international).

reference_number.description: Seven-digit unique reference number embedded in positions 11-17 of the tracking number.

routing_code.description: UPS routing code identifying destination sort facility and delivery route, displayed prominently on the label.

separating_lines.description: Narrow lines used to segregate barcode and information blocks on the label for visual structure.

service_icon.description: Graphical icon indicating UPS service class, time of day, and day of delivery using a 3-position code.

service_indicator.description: Two-character code embedded in the tracking number identifying the specific UPS service level and accessorial options.

service_name.description: Human-readable UPS service name indicating the level of service for the shipment.

service_title.description: Prominently displayed name of the UPS service being used for the shipment.

service_type.description: UPS service level for the shipment, represented by the service icon and encoded in the service indicator.

ship_date.description: Date the shipment is tendered to UPS, in DD MMM YYYY format.

ship_from_address.description: Complete shipper/sender address block including contact name, phone, company, street, postal code, and country.

ship_from_city_postal_code.description: City and postal code of the shipper/sender location within the ship-from address block.

ship_from_company_name.description: Company name of the shipper/sender in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_contact_name.description: Contact name of the person at the shipping origin/sender location.

ship_from_country.description: Country name of the shipper/sender, displayed as the last line of the ship-from address block.

ship_from_extended_address.description: Additional address line for the shipper such as suite, floor, or building in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_phone_number.description: The telephone number of the shipper/sender in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_postal_code_line.description: The postal/ZIP code and city line for the shipper's address, format varies by country.

ship_from_street_address.description: The street address of the shipper/sender location.

ship_to_address.description: The street address of the destination/consignee, also encoded in the MaxiCode secondary message.

ship_to_city.description: The city name of the destination/consignee address, maximum 20 characters, also encoded in MaxiCode.

ship_to_company_name.description: The company name at the destination/consignee address, or UPS Access Point facility name for AP shipments.

ship_to_consignee_name.description: The name of the person to whom the package is being shipped.

ship_to_consignee_phone_number.description: The telephone number of the consignee/recipient, required for Access Point labels.

ship_to_contact_name.description: The contact name at the destination/consignee address, preceded by the TO: prefix.

ship_to_country.description: The full country name of the destination/consignee address, required for international shipments.

ship_to_country_code.description: The 3-digit ISO 3166 numeric country code for the destination, encoded in the MaxiCode primary message.

ship_to_extended_address.description: Additional address line for the destination/consignee such as suite, floor, or building.

ship_to_label.description: The SHIP TO: label text that introduces the consignee address block on the label.

ship_to_phone_number.description: The phone number of the consignee/recipient at the destination address.

ship_to_postal_code.description: The postal code of the destination address, encoded in both MaxiCode primary message and postal barcode.

ship_to_postal_code_city.description: The combined postal code and city of the consignee destination, format varies by country.

ship_to_postal_code_line.description: The postal/ZIP code and city line for the destination address, format varies by country.

ship_to_state_province.description: The 2-character state or province code of the destination, encoded in MaxiCode secondary message.

ship_to_street_address.description: The street address of the destination/consignee, or UAP street address for Access Point shipments.

shipment_date.description: The date the shipment is created/tendered to UPS, required for international movements

shipment_dimensional_weight.description: The shipment dimensional weight, printed when dimensional weight applies for non-US-domestic movements

shipment_id_number.description: An optional shipment identifier encoded in the MaxiCode secondary message

shipment_number.description: UPS shipment number calculated from the first package tracking number, required for international shipments

shipment_weight.description: The total weight of all packages in the shipment, rounded up to the next whole pound or half kilogram

shipper_number.description: The unique UPS shipper number identifying the shipping account, displayed in the ship-from information area

tracking_number.description: The UPS customized unique 18-character package tracking number starting with 1Z

tracking_number_barcode.description: Code 128 barcode encoding the full 1Z tracking number, the primary machine-readable barcode on the label

tracking_number_human_readable.description: Human-readable text representation of the tracking number printed near the tracking barcode

uap_city_postal_code.description: The city and postal code of the UPS Access Point location

uap_country.description: The country of the UPS Access Point location

uap_extended_address.description: Additional address line for the UPS Access Point location

uap_name.description: The name of the UPS Access Point location where the package will be held for pickup

uap_street_address.description: The street address of the UPS Access Point location

ups_account_number.description: The 6-character UPS account number embedded in positions 3-8 of the tracking number

ups_pak_indicator.description: Weight and PAK indicator replacing the standard package weight when UPS PAK packaging is used

ups_routing_code.description: UPS delivery facility routing code derived from the destination postal code, 12 positions

ups_scac.description: The Standard Carrier Alpha Code for UPS, always fixed value UPSN, encoded in MaxiCode secondary message

ups_service_title.description: The complete UPS service name printed in uppercase letters identifying the service used for the shipment

urc_version_number.description: The version number of the UPS Routing Code data file used to generate routing information
